name: Sesame Seeds
summary: Small seeds rich in the lignan sesamin and, when unhulled, an unusually good plant source of calcium.

benefits.mechanism: Sesame supplies unsaturated fats and the lignans sesamin and sesamolin, which act as antioxidants and influence cholesterol handling. A GRADE-assessed meta-analysis found sesame products improved cardiovascular disease risk factors — including blood lipids and blood pressure — in people with diabetes.

citations.title: The beneficial effects of sesame (Sesamum indicum L.) products and their bioactive compounds on cardiovascular disease risk factors in patients with diabetes: a GRADE-assessed systematic review and meta-analysis (2025)

benefits.claim: Unhulled sesame is a rare plant source of calcium
benefits.mechanism: Whole (unhulled) sesame seeds are notably high in calcium — the mineral bones and teeth are built from and that muscles and nerves need — making them a useful plant contributor to calcium intake.

citations.title: Calcium — NIH Office of Dietary Supplements (Health Professional Fact Sheet)

surprisingFacts.text: Most of sesame's calcium sits in the hull — so unhulled seeds carry far more than the hulled seeds used for most tahini and burger buns.
